suites.rationale: Exercises the exact Open GSD config behavior consumed by the composed package.
suites.bumpReviewTrigger: review the config.cjs dependency and observable config behavior on every Open GSD version bump

suites.rationale: The legacy core.cjs re-export spine is not part of the active Open GSD authority.
suites.trigger: remove after canonical replacement suites cover every retained behavior

suites.rationale: Verifies frontmatter behavior used by the composed package while recording the internal module dependency explicitly.
suites.bumpReviewTrigger: review the frontmatter.cjs dependency and observable parsing behavior on every Open GSD version bump

suites.rationale: Exercises canonical phase identity and ordering behavior from the exact Open GSD phase module consumed by the composed package.
suites.bumpReviewTrigger: review the phase-id.cjs dependency and observable phase behavior on every Open GSD version bump

suites.rationale: The source-only sync helper still depends on the legacy repository layout and is enforced by a separate repository gate.
suites.trigger: port when the sync helper can consume the composed Open GSD package or retire when that source-only helper is removed

suites.rationale: Verifies template selection behavior while recording the exact internal module dependency.
suites.bumpReviewTrigger: review the template.cjs dependency and observable template behavior on every Open GSD version bump
